zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Wilford of Oxton於大約1405年出生在英國戴文艾可謝特時，他的父親William Wilford41歲，母親Margaret Cornu37歲。他於大約1450年與Joan結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1476年11月18日之前在英國戴文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Wilford of Oxton于大约1405年出生在英国戴文艾可謝特时，他的父亲William Wilford41岁，母亲Margaret Cornu37岁。他于大约1450年与Joan结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1476年11月18日之前在英国戴文。

nameMeanings.name: Wilford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Nottinghamshire): habitational name from either of two places called Wilford, in Nottinghamshire and Suffolk, both probably named with an Old English wilig ‘willow tree’ + Old English ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Wilfert
meanings: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wolf ‘wolf’ + hart ‘hardy, brave’, ‘strong’.
from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements willio ‘will, wish’ + fridu ‘peace’.

variants.name: Willford
meanings: English (East Yorkshire, Lincolnshire, Rutland, and Northamptonshire): variant of   Wilford  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Wilford of Oxton was born about 1405, in Exeter, Devon, England, his father, William Wilford, was 41 and his mother, Margaret Cornu, was 37. He married Joan about 1450. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 18 November 1476, in Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Wilford of Oxton est né environ 1405, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, son père, William Wilford, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Margaret Cornu, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Joan environ 1450. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 18 novembre 1476, à Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Wilford of Oxton um 1405 in Exeter, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Wilford 41 und seine Mutter Margaret Cornu 37. Er hat um 1450 Joan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 18. November 1476 in Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Wilford of Oxton è nato il circa 1405 nel Exeter, Devon, England, il suo padre, William Wilford, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Cornu, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Joan circa 1450. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 18 novembre 1476, nel Devon, England.

ja.Exeter, Devon, England: イギリスデボンエクセター
ja.lifeSummary: Robert Wilford of Oxtonが約1405年にイギリスデボンエクセターで生まれた時，父William Wilfordは41歳，母Margaret Cornuは37歳であった。約1450年にJoanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1476年11月18日以前にイギリスデボンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Wilford of Oxton(이)가 대략 1405년 영국 데폰 세터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Wilford(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Cornu(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1450년 Joan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1476년 11월 18일 이전 영국 데폰에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1405–before 18 November 1476: ойролцоогоор 1405 он–1476 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 18–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Wilford of Oxton nasceu aproximadamente 1405, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Wilford, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Cornu, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan aproximadamente 1450. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 18 de novembro de 1476, em Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Wilford of Oxton родился около 1405 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени William Wilford было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Cornu, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan около 1450 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 18 ноябрь 1476 г. в местности девон, Англия.

Se casó con Joan aproximadamente 1450. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 18 de noviembre de 1476, en Devon, Inglaterra.
